rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF ELIZABETH L. ZUT
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To First Amended Petition
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, MARCH 19, 2007, LINE 1. RESPONDENT TERRY MCGILLICUDDY AND OLD REPUBLIC TITLE COMPANY'S Demurrer To First Amended Petition IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND THE FIFTH, SIXTH AND ELEVENTH CAUSES OF ACTION. THE FIRST (TO ALLEGE FRAUD OR BREACH OF ESCROW INSTRUCTIONS), NINTH AND TENTH CAUSES OF ACTION ARE SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. =(302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF ELIZABETH L. ZUT
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrer Of Indymac Bank To First Amended Petition
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, MARCH 19, 2007, LINE 1. RESPONDENT INDYMAC BANK, F.S.B.'S Demurrer To First Amended Petition IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND THE FIRST, SECOND, THIRD, FOURTH, FIFTH, SIXTH, TENTH AND ELEVENTH CAUSES OF ACTION. SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE FIRST, EIGHTH, NINTH AND TENTH CAUSES OF ACTION. OVERRULED AS TO THE SEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION. =(302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF ELIZABETH L. ZUT
rulings.Calendar Matter: Hearing On Respondent Washington Mutual Bank'S Demurrer To First Amended Petition
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, MARCH 19, 2007, LINE 1. RESPONDENT WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED PETITION: CAUSES OF ACTION 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 10 AND 11 ARE SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. CAUSES OF ACTION 8 AND 9 ARE SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND IN 20 DAYS. THE SEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. =(302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF ELIZABETH L. ZUT
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike First Amended Petition
